scope: Premium interactive executive layer — semantic zone definition + report pack integration + representation field refinement

checks.name: semantic_zone_inventory_created
checks.description: Eight semantic zones (Z1 – Z8) defined and authoritatively documented in SEMANTIC_ZONE_INVENTORY.md.
checks.notes: Z1 Executive Posture, Z2 Resolution Boundary, Z3 Semantic Topology, Z4 Pressure Anchor, Z5 Signal Stack, Z6 Cluster Concentration, Z7 Evidence Trace, Z8 Report Pack Access. Each carries source artifact family, semantic purpose, persona visibility, rendering rule, forbidden behaviors, and visible signature.

checks.name: ai_semantic_panel_contracts_created
checks.description: Per-zone AI rendering contract specified in AI_SEMANTIC_PANEL_CONTRACTS.md for all eight zones.
checks.notes: Each contract specifies zone_id, zone_name, source_artifact_family, required_structured_inputs, AI_rendering_responsibility, evidence_grounding_rule, persona_visibility, forbidden_static_copy_behavior, visual_representation_form, confidence_qualifier_display_rule.

checks.name: static_reports_mapped_as_artifacts_not_content_source
checks.description: Static reports are listed as canonical artifact entries with binding paths; not consumed as runtime content.
checks.notes: STATIC_REPORT_ARTIFACT_INDEX.md inventories the four canonical artifacts and their semantic zone coverage. REPORT_PACK_ARTIFACTS in source carries id/tier/name/file/binding_path metadata only — never the artifact body.

checks.name: report_pack_access_layer_defined
checks.description: Report Pack band implemented in source and modeled in REPORT_PACK_INTEGRATION_MODEL.md.
checks.notes: ReportPackBand component rendered between EvidenceDepthLayer and GovernanceRibbon. Visible in all four lens captures. Calm horizontal band, anti-dashboard compliant. aria-disabled until live binding lands.

checks.name: future_client_run_binding_contract_created
checks.description: FUTURE_CLIENT_RUN_BINDING_CONTRACT.md authoritatively specifies the client/run → static-report and lens-payload binding architecture.
checks.notes: Specifies /api/report-pack and /api/lens-payload contracts, integration plan, sequencing, and explicit honest scope (this stream does NOT implement the binding; design only).

checks.name: no_static_html_prose_injection
checks.description: No paragraphs from any static report HTML (Decision Surface, Tier-1 Narrative Brief, Tier-1 Evidence Brief, Tier-2 Diagnostic Narrative) are embedded in the LENS V2 source.
checks.notes: BALANCED consequence statement and DENSE dense-note are hard-coded prose authored for this surface — not scraped from any static report. INVESTIGATION trace bands draw evidence_text/evidence_description from the in-memory fixture, NOT from static HTML files. Report Pack lists artifact NAMES only — never artifact bodies.

checks.name: no_fake_pipeline_binding_claim
checks.description: Report Pack entries are aria-disabled with 'binding pending' captions; no fake live URLs; no implied freshness or generation date.
checks.notes: Each entry's tooltip carries the future binding path, explicitly captioned 'pending real client/run integration'. cursor: not-allowed. data-binding="pending". State dot tinted neutral.

checks.name: representation_field_refined
checks.description: Representation Field unified by addition of zone chips inside RepModeTag; less repetitive across modes; clearer zone identity.
checks.notes: Zone chip stripe added under each lens's persona tag. DENSE adds Cluster Concentration sub-panel. Common shell (mode tag → mode content → evidence state) preserved across all modes; mode-specific content varies by lens.

checks.name: persona_zone_mapping_preserved
checks.description: Persona ↔ zone matrix preserved per the contract: BALANCED → Z1+Z2+Z4 + Z8; DENSE → Z3+Z4+Z6 + Z8; INVESTIGATION → Z7+Z5+Z2 + Z8; BOARDROOM → Z1+Z2 + Z8.
checks.notes: Encoded in source via per-field zones={...} prop. Encoded visibly via zone chip stripe. Documented in PERSONA_TO_SEMANTIC_ZONE_MATRIX.md.

checks.name: playwright_screenshots_captured
checks.description: Mandatory captures completed for all four lenses at 1440×900 (viewport + full-page).
checks.notes: 8 PNG total under docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.PREMIUM-INTERACTIVE-EXECUTIVE-LAYER.01/screenshots/. Filenames: balanced_1440x900_{viewport,full}.png, dense_1440x900_{viewport,full}.png, investigation_1440x900_{viewport,full}.png, boardroom_1440x900_{viewport,full}.png.

checks.name: no_governance_mutation
checks.description: No changes to docs/governance/, validators, or any governance contract.
checks.notes: git diff confirms changes scoped to docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.PREMIUM-INTERACTIVE-EXECUTIVE-LAYER.01/, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.PREMIUM-INTERACTIVE-EXECUTIVE-LAYER.01/, and app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.

checks.name: no_evidence_semantic_mutation
checks.description: No changes to evidence semantics, signal interpretation, render-state vocabulary, qualifier-class semantics, propagation logic, or governance ribbon pass/fail logic.
checks.notes: Render-state vocabulary preserved verbatim. Qualifier semantics (Q-00 / Q-01) preserved. Orchestration module untouched. Fixture untouched. Governance verdict logic untouched.

checks.name: no_unrelated_route_mutation
checks.description: No edits to other routes within app/execlens-demo, no edits to app/gauge-product or any unrelated frontend surface.
checks.notes: git diff confirms exactly one source file modified: app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.
